headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Micron Technology (MU) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are trying to figure out whether Micron Technology at around US$321.80 is still good value or already pricing in a lot of optimism, you will want to look past the headlines and into what the numbers actually say. The stock has had a mixed run recently, with a 18.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 22.0% decline over the last 30 days, while still showing returns of 2.0% year to date and 263.6% over the last year. Recent coverage around Micron has focused on its role as a key player...

headline: Micron’s HBM4 Is Sold Out As TurboQuant Questions Future Memory Needs
summary: Google has introduced its TurboQuant AI algorithm, which aims to improve memory efficiency for AI models and is prompting investors to reassess long term memory demand. Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) reports that its full year HBM4 capacity is already sold out under binding contracts. The company has signed its first five year customer agreement, extending visibility on demand for its high bandwidth memory products. Micron Technology, known for DRAM, NAND and high bandwidth memory, sits at...
